bridle 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Bridle Agent

Source: R/bridle_agent.R
bridle_agent.Rd

Creates a runtime agent that orchestrates all Phase 2 components: graph traversal, knowledge retrieval, prompt assembly, LLM chat, response parsing, code execution, and decision logging.

Initializes all runtime components from a plugin directory containing YAML configuration files.

bridle_agent(
  plugin_dir,
  provider = NULL,
  model = NULL,
  log_dir = NULL,
  sandbox_timeout = 10
)

Arguments

plugin_dir

Path to plugin directory containing YAML files (decision_graph.yaml, knowledge.yaml, constraints.yaml, context_schema.yaml).

provider

LLM provider name (character or NULL for auto-detect). See bridle_runtime_chat() for resolution order.

model

LLM model name (character or NULL for provider default).

log_dir

Directory for JSONL decision logs (character or NULL to disable logging).

sandbox_timeout

Timeout in seconds for code execution (numeric).

Value

A list with class "bridle_agent" containing all runtime components and a console() method.

Contents
